untranslatable_reason: Signal requires institutional flow detection (block buys, options positioning, mean reversion signals) which cannot be derived from price/technical indicators alone. No institutional flow or order flow indicators available in allowed set. Thresholds for relative strength percentile, overextension limits, and rebalance frequency are also not specified in source text (marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]).
translation_notes: Approximated 'relative strength leader in top percentile' using price_pos_20 > 0.75 (price in upper quartile of 20-bar range). Used vol_ratio_20 > 1.2 as proxy for 'institutional support' (elevated volume). Entry requires price above SMA_20 (trend confirmation). Exit conditions use arbitrary thresholds: 5% profit target and RSI > 70 (overextension). Original signal's core requirement—institutional money flow detection—is not translatable without order flow data.
